title: oldenlandia elegans
intro: Oldenlandia elegans, also known as Eclipta alba or False Daisy, is a herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia elegans include its ability to promote hair growth, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia elegans include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and hair loss.
